document.source_title: ‘Captaincy has affected Ruturaj’s batting’- Ashwin’s blunt CSK verdict
document.summary: Ravichandran Ashwin has commented on the impact of captaincy on Ruturaj Gaikwad's batting performance during IPL 2026. Following a disappointing match against Sunrisers Hyderabad, Ashwin noted that the pressure of leading Chennai Super Kings during a transition phase post-MS Dhoni is affecting Gaikwad's game. He emphasized the need for patience as the team rebuilds and acknowledged the high expectations from fans and stakeholders.
key_takeaways: Ashwin believes captaincy is impacting Gaikwad's batting.
CSK is in a rebuilding phase after MS Dhoni's era.
Expectations from CSK remain high due to their legacy.
Gaikwad scored only 15 runs off 21 balls in a recent match.
SRH secured their playoff spot after defeating CSK.
The match highlighted CSK's need for improvement in capitalizing on strong starts.
document.why_it_matters: Understanding the pressures of leadership in sports can provide insights into player performance and team dynamics, especially during transitional phases.
